movie.title: Desire
movie.overview: Lucero’s life appears immaculate: a wealthy household, a devoted husband, and two children who embody the promise of a perfect family. Yet beneath this surface simmers a quiet dissatisfaction. When Matías, a young swimming coach hired by her husband, enters their lives, Lucero finds herself pulled into a risky and consuming relationship. As secrecy, desire, and jealousy tighten their grip, the boundaries within the family begin to collapse, placing mother and daughter in a dangerous emotional triangle that threatens to shatter everything Lucero has built.

aiEnrichment.summary_one_sentence: A seemingly perfect wife and mother risks destroying her family when she begins a dangerous affair with her children's young swimming coach, creating a volatile emotional triangle with her daughter.
aiEnrichment.summary_short: Lucero appears to live an ideal life with her wealthy husband and two children, but harbors a quiet dissatisfaction beneath the surface. When Matías, a young swimming coach hired by her husband, enters their household, Lucero is drawn into a risky and consuming secret relationship. As desire, secrecy, and jealousy intensify, the family's boundaries begin to erode. Mother and daughter soon become entangled in a dangerous emotional triangle that threatens to shatter everything Lucero has built.
aiEnrichment.summary_long: Lucero lives in a wealthy household with a devoted husband and two children who seem to represent the perfect family. Despite this immaculate exterior, she struggles with a persistent, quiet dissatisfaction with her life. Her husband hires Matías, a young swimming coach, to work with their children, bringing a new and disruptive presence into the home. Lucero finds herself increasingly attracted to Matías and enters into a risky, consuming secret relationship with him. As the affair continues, secrecy and desire begin to weave a complicated web within the family dynamic. Jealousy emerges as a powerful force, tightening its grip on those involved and blurring the lines between loyalty and longing. Lucero's daughter becomes unexpectedly caught in the emotional crossfire, forming a dangerous triangle between mother, daughter, and Matías. The boundaries that once defined the family start to collapse under the weight of hidden truths and conflicting feelings. What began as a private escape for Lucero evolves into a threat to the very foundation of her constructed life. Ultimately, the escalating tensions place everything she has built at risk of being irrevocably shattered.
aiEnrichment.synopsis: Desire is a dramatic mystery that follows Lucero, a woman whose life appears flawless on the outside—a wealthy home, a loving husband, and two children who seem to complete the perfect family picture. Beneath the polished surface, however, Lucero quietly yearns for something more. When a young swimming coach named Matías is brought into their lives by her husband, Lucero is pulled into a forbidden and all-consuming relationship. As secrecy and longing take hold, the stability of the household begins to unravel, and an unsettling emotional dynamic develops between mother and daughter. The series explores the fragile boundaries of family, the destructive power of desire, and the hidden vulnerabilities behind a seemingly ideal life.

story_structure.climax: The emotional triangle and collapsing boundaries bring the family to a breaking point where everything Lucero has built is threatened with shattering.
story_structure.conflict: The arrival of Matías, a young swimming coach hired by her husband, draws Lucero into a risky and consuming relationship that disrupts her settled existence.
story_structure.resolution: The aftermath of the confrontation forces a reckoning within the family, leaving the stability of Lucero's world irrevocably altered.
story_structure.introduction: Lucero appears to live an immaculate life with a wealthy household, devoted husband, and two children, though a quiet dissatisfaction simmers beneath the surface.
story_structure.risingAction: Secrecy, desire, and jealousy tighten their grip as Lucero's hidden involvement deepens, placing her and her daughter in a dangerous emotional triangle that erodes family boundaries.
